name: Forever Raspberries Topping
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Family Circle, vol. 105 no. 3, 2/1/93
Melt raspberry jam in a small saucepan over low heat. Use three tablespoons to sandwich cake layers together. Brush one tablespoon over the top layer. Cover the cake with dark chocolate curls. Use the remaining jam to glaze the berries. Just before serving, sprinkle with ten times the amount of sugar.
